title: Set of 2 Xmas Holiday Drinking Cup with Spiral Straw - Christmas Character Design for Festive Drinkware Set for Xmas Eve Box Stocking Filler
features: Festive Design: These delightful Christmas drinking cups with spiral straws bring festive cheer to your holiday celebrations. The set of 2 reusable cups features charming gingerbread and Christmas character designs that capture the magic of the season. Set of 2 reusable drinking cups featuring charming gingerbread and Christmas character designs, perfect for adding holiday cheer to your celebrations
Complete Set: Each cup comes with a fun spiral curly straw, making drinks more enjoyable for children during the festive season.

Reusable & Practical: Durable construction allows for repeated use throughout the Christmas period and beyond, ideal for parties, family gatherings, or everyday use. The reusable design means they can be enjoyed throughout the holiday season and beyond, whilst the secure lids help prevent spills during excited celebrations. These cups make wonderful additions to Christmas Eve boxes or as part of your festive table setting.

Perfect Gift Idea: Makes an excellent stocking filler or Christmas Eve box addition that children will love using during the holiday season.The playful spiral straws add an extra element of fun that children will love, transforming ordinary drinks into special holiday treats.
